title: LeAnn Mendoza Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
LeAnn Mendoza Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet LeAnn Mendoza
Align Student
MS in Data science ’24
Silicon Valley Campus
LeAnn Mendoza knew she wanted to work in tech, but she wasn’t sure how she would fit in with a bachelor’s degree in bioengineering. Her time in the Align program helped bridge that experience with a computer science education, opening doors she didn’t realize were there.
What I love about the Align program is that it allows people who don’t necessarily come from your
typical tech backgrounds a way to break into tech, to break into data science and computer science
LeAnn Mendoza, MSDS ’24
Explore all Khoury Stories
